description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and define the variables CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE and CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE pointing to registry.gitlab.com/perlstalker/octopress-deploy with appropriate tags. Include a before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com with the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN. In the build stage add a build job that runs docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE . then docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, and runs on runners tagged docker. In the release stage add a release-image job that only runs on the master branch, runs docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, docker tag $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, also on docker‑tagged runners. Define the stages build and release.
